title: rootless: fix CI regression when using slirp4netns
body:
Older versions of slirp4netns do not have the --disable-host-loopback
flag.

Remove the check once we are sure the updated version is available
everywhere.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

@cevich could we update the Fedora images?  No idea why slirp4netns is failing
@giuseppe Yes happy to make new images. PR #2561 should help (assuming I can get it working) with this process.
Opened #2689 w/ updated images.  @giuseppe somehow I missed the e-mail notice for this...feel free to ping me on IRC for this next time - it's not much effort on my part.
